# daytona_shared_regions (Data Source)

Lists Daytona shared regions visible to the configured credentials.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_shared_regions" "available" {}

output "daytona_shared_region_ids" {
  value = [for region in data.daytona_shared_regions.available.items : region.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned Daytona objects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID, when this data source is scoped to one organization.

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Object ID.
- `name` (String) Object name.
- `state` (String) Object state, when applicable.
